title: Hybrid memory graph
description: An inspectable graph of entities, relations and decisions, kept in sync with a Markdown wiki you can edit.

title: Contained local computer
description: A sandboxed browser + shell the agent drives — watch it live over noVNC and take over anytime.

title: Channels with an approval gate
description: WhatsApp and Telegram flow into memory and drafts, behind an allowlist and an approval gate.

title: When → Then automations
description: Time- and event-triggered agentic actions, proposed from the routines the apprentice observes.

title: Bring-your-own-model routing
description: Local Ollama or any cloud provider, enabled per provider and routed per task by a capability router.

title: The apprentice
description: The autonomous loop that ties it together — observes your work, learns routines, proposes, and acts under permission. Being integrated now.

title: Plugin & addon marketplace
description: A catalog of installable, sandboxed addons — browse on the web, install into the app.

title: Autonomous multi-step tasks
description: A plan-driven engine that carries long tasks across many steps, under approvals you grant.

title: Mobile companion app
description: Homun on your phone, paired securely with the machine that holds your data.

title: Non-destructive chat branching
description: Explore alternate directions in a conversation without losing the original thread.

title: More native connectors
description: A growing set of first-party integrations, all behind the capability router and explicit grants.

title: Event-based automations
description: Triggers that fire on an event — a new message, email or file — not just on a schedule.

title: Shared, permissioned spaces
description: Optional spaces for working alongside other people — still local-first, still deny-by-default.

title: Voice & ambient capture
description: Talk to the apprentice, and let it observe more of your workflow — with your permission.
